packageDirectories.versionDescription: Date-range pill: keep Custom popover open under Lightning Web Security closed shadow DOM

name: fluentmetric-ai
__comment: Two editions: force-app (default, Lightning) and force-app-tableau (Tableau Next, depends on Lightning's AiInsightsService). The Tableau package's `dependencies` block ensures 2GP installs the Lightning edition automatically when admins use the Tableau install URL. The packageAliases above are placeholders until DevHub `cvk-dev` runs `sf package create` for both packages — see Documents/Developer/release.md.
